description: Style Note One casual garment that'll make you look sophisticated in an instant is this t-shirt from status quo. The quirky embroidery on the chest renders a subtle charm to the tee, while the soft blended fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team it with jeans and sports shoes for a touch of style. Product Details Black body Fit, stretch fit t-shirt that has a v-neck, short sleeves and branding in rubber print on the left chest Material and Care Blended fabric Machine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Cool iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Body fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
